ic_body_slam.name: Body Slam
ic_body_slam.description:
Deal damage equal
to your Block.

ic_anger.name: Anger
ic_anger.description:
Deal 6 damage.
Add a copy to
your discard pile.

ic_wild_strike.name: Wild Strike
ic_wild_strike.description:
Deal 12 damage.
Shuffle a Wound into
your draw pile.

ic_uppercut.name: Uppercut
ic_uppercut.description:
Deal 13 damage.
Apply 1 Weak.
Apply 1 Vulnerable.

ic_immolate.name: Immolate
ic_immolate.description:
Deal 21 damage to
ALL enemies.
Add a Burn to discard.

ic_fiend_fire.name: Fiend Fire
ic_fiend_fire.description:
Exhaust your hand.
Deal 7 damage for
each card exhausted.

ic_reaper.name: Reaper
ic_reaper.description:
Deal 4 damage to
ALL enemies.
Heal for unblocked damage.

ic_thunderclap.name: Thunderclap
ic_thunderclap.description:
Deal 4 damage to
ALL enemies.
Apply 1 Vulnerable.

ic_reckless_charge.name: Reckless Charge
ic_reckless_charge.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Shuffle a Dazed into
your draw pile.

ic_clash.name: Clash
ic_clash.description:
Can only be played if
every card in hand
is an Attack.
Deal 14 damage.

ic_perfected_strike.name: Perfected Strike
ic_perfected_strike.description:
Deal 6 damage. Deals
2 additional damage
for each "Strike" card
in your deck.

ic_sword_boomerang.name: Sword Boomerang
ic_sword_boomerang.description:
Deal 3 damage to a
random enemy 3 times.

ic_whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
ic_whirlwind.description:
Deal 5 damage to ALL
enemies X times.
(X = current Energy)

ic_dropkick.name: Dropkick
ic_dropkick.description:
Deal 5 damage.
If enemy is Vulnerable:
gain 1 Energy, draw 1.

ic_feed.name: Feed
ic_feed.description:
Deal 10 damage.
If this kills, gain
3 Max HP. Exhaust.

ic_rampage.name: Rampage
ic_rampage.description:
Deal 8 damage.
Increases by 5
each time played.

ic_sever_soul.name: Sever Soul
ic_sever_soul.description:
Exhaust all non-Attack
cards in hand.
Deal 16 damage.

ic_blood_for_blood.name: Blood for Blood
ic_blood_for_blood.description:
Costs 1 less for each
time you lose HP this
combat. Deal 18 dmg.

ic_flame_barrier.name: Flame Barrier
ic_flame_barrier.description:
Gain 12 Block.
When attacked this turn,
deal 4 damage back.

ic_flex.name: Flex
ic_flex.description:
Gain 2 Strength.
At end of turn,
lose 2 Strength.

ic_shockwave.name: Shockwave
ic_shockwave.description:
Apply 3 Weak and
3 Vulnerable to
ALL enemies. Exhaust.

ic_power_through.name: Power Through
ic_power_through.description:
Gain 15 Block.
Add 2 Wounds to
your hand.

ic_offering.name: Offering
ic_offering.description:
Lose 6 HP.
Gain 2 Energy.
Draw 3 cards.
Exhaust.

ic_second_wind.name: Second Wind
ic_second_wind.description:
Exhaust all non-Attack
cards in hand. Gain
5 Block for each.

ic_intimidate.name: Intimidate
ic_intimidate.description:
Apply 1 Weak to
ALL enemies. Exhaust.

ic_infernal_blade.name: Infernal Blade
ic_infernal_blade.description:
Add a random Attack
to your hand. It
costs 0. Exhaust.

ic_dual_wield.name: Dual Wield
ic_dual_wield.description:
Copy an Attack or
Power card in hand.

ic_havoc.name: Havoc
ic_havoc.description:
Play the top card of
your draw pile and
Exhaust it.

ic_exhume.name: Exhume
ic_exhume.description:
Put a card from your
exhaust pile into
your hand. Exhaust.

ic_sentinel.name: Sentinel
ic_sentinel.description:
Gain 5 Block.
If this card is
Exhausted, gain
2 Energy.

ic_spot_weakness.name: Spot Weakness
ic_spot_weakness.description:
If the enemy intends
to attack, gain
3 Strength.

ic_true_grit.name: True Grit
ic_true_grit.description:
Gain 7 Block.
Exhaust a random
card in your hand.

ic_double_tap.name: Double Tap
ic_double_tap.description:
This turn, your next
Attack is played twice.

ic_demon_form.name: Demon Form
ic_demon_form.description:
At the start of
each turn, gain 2
Strength.

ic_corruption.name: Corruption
ic_corruption.description:
Skills cost 0.
Whenever you play a
Skill, Exhaust it.

ic_berserk.name: Berserk
ic_berserk.description:
Gain 1 Vulnerable.
At the start of each
turn, gain 1 Energy.

ic_feel_no_pain.name: Feel No Pain
ic_feel_no_pain.description:
Whenever a card is
Exhausted, gain
3 Block.

ic_juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
ic_juggernaut.description:
Whenever you gain
Block, deal 5 damage
to a random enemy.

ic_evolve.name: Evolve
ic_evolve.description:
Whenever you draw a
Status card, draw 1.

ic_rage.name: Rage
ic_rage.description:
Whenever you play an
Attack this turn,
gain 3 Block.

ic_barricade.name: Barricade
ic_barricade.description:
Block is not removed
at the start of
your turn.

ic_metallicize.name: Metallicize
ic_metallicize.description:
At the end of your
turn, gain 3 Block.

ic_brutality.name: Brutality
ic_brutality.description:
At the start of your
turn, lose 1 HP and
draw 1 card.

ic_combust.name: Combust
ic_combust.description:
At the end of your
turn, lose 1 HP and
deal 5 damage to ALL
enemies.

ic_dark_embrace.name: Dark Embrace
ic_dark_embrace.description:
Whenever a card is
Exhausted, draw 1.

ic_rupture.name: Rupture
ic_rupture.description:
Whenever you lose HP
from a card, gain
1 Strength.

ic_fire_breathing.name: Fire Breathing
ic_fire_breathing.description:
Whenever you draw a
Status or Curse, deal
6 damage to ALL.

si_dagger_spray.name: Dagger Spray
si_dagger_spray.description:
Deal 4 damage to ALL
enemies twice.

si_flick_flack.name: Flick-Flack
si_flick_flack.description:
Sly. Deal 7 damage
to ALL enemies.

si_leading_strike.name: Leading Strike
si_leading_strike.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Add 1 Shiv to hand.

si_ricochet.name: Ricochet
si_ricochet.description:
Sly. Deal 3 damage
to random enemy 4x.

si_dodge_and_roll.name: Dodge and Roll
si_dodge_and_roll.description:
Gain 4 Block this
turn and next.

si_cloak_and_dagger.name: Cloak and Dagger
si_cloak_and_dagger.description:
Gain 6 Block.
Add 1 Shiv to hand.

si_escape_plan.name: Escape Plan
si_escape_plan.description:
Draw 1 card. If it
is a Skill, gain
3 Block.

si_calculated_gamble.name: Calculated Gamble
si_calculated_gamble.description:
Discard your hand.
Draw that many cards.

si_skewer.name: Skewer
si_skewer.description:
Deal 7 damage X times.
(X = current Energy)

si_die_die_die.name: Die Die Die
si_die_die_die.description:
Deal 13 damage to
ALL enemies. Exhaust.

si_endless_agony.name: Endless Agony
si_endless_agony.description:
Deal 4 damage.
Exhaust. When drawn,
add copy to hand.

si_finisher.name: Finisher
si_finisher.description:
Deal 6 damage for
each Attack played
this turn.

si_flying_knee.name: Flying Knee
si_flying_knee.description:
Deal 8 damage.
Gain 1 Energy
next turn.

si_heel_hook.name: Heel Hook
si_heel_hook.description:
Deal 5 damage.
If enemy is Weak:
gain 1 Energy, draw 1.

si_glass_knife.name: Glass Knife
si_glass_knife.description:
Deal 8 damage twice.
Damage decreases by 2
each use.

si_choke.name: Choke
si_choke.description:
Deal 12 damage.
Whenever enemy plays
a card, take 3 damage.

si_blur.name: Blur
si_blur.description:
Gain 5 Block.
Block not removed
next turn.

si_distraction.name: Distraction
si_distraction.description:
Add a random Skill
to your hand.
Exhaust.

si_expertise.name: Expertise
si_expertise.description:
Draw cards until you
have 6 in hand.

si_setup.name: Setup
si_setup.description:
Put a card from hand
on top of draw pile.

si_crippling_cloud.name: Crippling Cloud
si_crippling_cloud.description:
Apply 4 Poison and
2 Weak to ALL enemies.

si_noxious_fumes.name: Noxious Fumes
si_noxious_fumes.description:
At start of turn,
apply 2 Poison to
ALL enemies.

si_infinite_blades.name: Infinite Blades
si_infinite_blades.description:
At start of turn,
add a Shiv to hand.

si_a_thousand_cuts.name: A Thousand Cuts
si_a_thousand_cuts.description:
Whenever you play a
card, deal 1 damage
to ALL enemies.

si_envenom.name: Envenom
si_envenom.description:
Whenever you deal
unblocked damage,
apply 1 Poison.

si_tools_of_the_trade.name: Tools of the Trade
si_tools_of_the_trade.description:
At start of turn,
draw 1, discard 1.

si_grand_finale.name: Grand Finale
si_grand_finale.description:
Can only play if draw
pile is empty.
Deal 50 damage.

si_unload.name: Unload
si_unload.description:
Deal 14 damage.
Discard all non-Attack
cards in hand.

si_bullet_time.name: Bullet Time
si_bullet_time.description:
Cards cost 0 this
turn. No draw
next turn.

si_corpse_explosion.name: Corpse Explosion
si_corpse_explosion.description:
Apply 6 Poison.
When enemy dies, deal
damage to ALL.

si_malaise.name: Malaise
si_malaise.description:
Enemy loses X Strength.
Apply X Weak.

si_nightmare.name: Nightmare
si_nightmare.description:
Choose a card. Add
3 copies to hand
next turn.

si_after_image.name: After Image
si_after_image.description:
Whenever you play a
card, gain 1 Block.

si_well_laid_plans.name: Well-Laid Plans
si_well_laid_plans.description:
At end of turn,
Retain up to 1 card.

si_wraith_form.name: Wraith Form
si_wraith_form.description:
Gain 2 Intangible.
Lose 1 Dexterity
per turn.

si_storm_of_steel.name: Storm of Steel
si_storm_of_steel.description:
Discard your hand.
Add a Shiv per card
discarded.

status_burn.name: Burn
status_burn.description:
Unplayable.
Take 2 damage at
end of turn.

nw_venomous_might.name: Venomous Might
nw_venomous_might.description:
At the start of each
turn, gain Strength
equal to total enemy
Poison ÷ 4.

nw_psi_surge.name: Psi Surge
nw_psi_surge.description:
Whenever you draw 3+
cards in a single
action, gain 1 Energy.

nw_blood_fury.name: Blood Fury
nw_blood_fury.description:
Whenever you lose HP
from a card, your
next Attack deals
double damage.

nw_toxic_storm.name: Toxic Storm
nw_toxic_storm.description:
Deal 3 damage to ALL
enemies X times.
Apply 1 Poison each
hit.

nw_echo_slash.name: Echo Slash
nw_echo_slash.description:
Deal 5 damage.
Hit once more for
each Attack played
this turn.

nw_gamblers_blade.name: Gambler's Blade
nw_gamblers_blade.description:
Deal damage equal to
hand size × 3.
Discard 1 card.

nw_poison_shield.name: Poison Shield
nw_poison_shield.description:
Gain Block equal to
total Poison on all
enemies.

nw_tactical_retreat.name: Tactical Retreat
nw_tactical_retreat.description:
Gain 6 Block.
Draw 2 cards.
Discard 1 card.

nw_all_in.name: All In
nw_all_in.description:
Consume all Energy.
Draw 2 cards per
Energy consumed.
Exhaust.
